nasb.text: Then David called for Zadok and Abiathar the priests, and for the Levites, for Uriel, Asaiah, Joel, Shemaiah, Eliel and Amminadab,

esv.text: Then David summoned the priests Zadok and Abiathar, and the Levites Uriel, Asaiah, Joel, Shemaiah, Eliel, and Amminadab,

cnv.text: 大衛把撒督和亞比亞他兩位祭司，以及烏列、亞帥雅、約珥、示瑪雅、以列和亞米拿達幾位利未人，召了來，

ccb.text: 大卫召来撒督和亚比亚他两位祭司以及利未人乌列、亚帅雅、约珥、示玛雅、以列、亚米拿达，
